    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Email] = @dto_Email) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

FROM [orders] AS [o]

    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[OrderDetailID], [o0].[OrderID], [o0].[Price], [o0].[ProductID], [o0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price] AS [Price0], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]

2026-06-24 10:17:36.217 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (7ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [u].[Name], [u].[Email], [u].[UserID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserID] = [u].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]

FROM [orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserID] = [u].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [u].[Name], [u].[Email], [u].[UserID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserID] = [u].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]
ORDER BY [o].[OrderID], [u].[UserID], [s].[OrderDetailID]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [u].[Name], [u].[Email], [u].[UserID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID]

2026-06-24 12:09:33.302 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (26ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
CREATE TABLE [Reviews] (
    [ReviewID] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [ProductID] int NOT NULL,
    [UserID] int NOT NULL,
    [Rating] int NOT NULL,
    [Comment] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Reviews] PRIMARY KEY ([ReviewID]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Reviews_Users_UserID] FOREIGN KEY ([UserID]) REFERENCES [Users] ([UserID]) ON DELETE CASCADE,

SELECT [c1].[CartID], [c1].[CreatedDate], [c1].[UserID], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartID], [s].[ProductID], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[CategoryID], [s].[Price], [s].[ProductImagePath], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Stock]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedDate], [c].[UserID]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserID] = @userId
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartID], [c0].[ProductID], [c0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]
    FROM [cartitems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [c0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[CartID] = [s].[CartID]
ORDER BY [c1].[CartID], [s].[CartItemID]

FROM [Users] AS [u]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [u].[Name], [u].[Email], [u].[UserID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserID] = [u].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0

    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]

        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [u].[Name], [u].[Email], [u].[UserID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserID] = [u].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]
ORDER BY [o].[OrderID], [u].[UserID], [s].[OrderDetailID]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]

    ELSE 0.0E0

FROM [orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]
